scope: wave1-pilot migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (boards, items, users, teams, tags), each a distinct GraphQL root QUERY field (a read, never a mutation) on the SAME single POST /v2 endpoint; monday's full documented API surface (mutations, webhooks, apps, other GraphQL types) is out of scope outside this connector's current declared surface. Every covered/excluded entry below is declared method GET (not the literal wire HTTP verb, which is always POST for GraphQL) to correctly signal READ semantics to connectorgen validate's capabilities.write/read cross-check (design §E.1 rule 4) — monday.com's GraphQL transport uses POST for both queries and mutations, so the wire verb alone cannot distinguish them the way REST's verb convention does.

excluded.reason: bounded identity/connectivity check used by Check(), not a syncable object stream
not implemented in this bundle; monday is read-only in this migration (legacy Write returns ErrUnsupportedOperation)
not implemented as a stream because it introduces an additional resource family or request shape outside this connector's current sync scope
